title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 532.570 - Officer or person to be committed
text:
532.570.  Officer or person to be committed. — On such person being so brought, he shall be committed to close custody, in the jail of the county in which the court or officer shall be, until he shall comply with such writ, and obey any order that may be made by such court or officer in relation to the person for whose relief such writ shall have been issued.
(RSMo 1939 § 1609) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1445; 1919 § 1895; 1909 § 2460
